_description: AH-gate expected architectural-invariant counters (Stage 1, Fmax-independent). Captured from azurelily/IMC/test.py --model attention --seq_length 128 --head_dim 64 with the per-call counter side-channel landed in fpga_fabric.py / imc_core.py / scheduler.py. Schema: per-stage dict of {dpe_fire_count, pass_count, row_count, lane_count, softmax_exp_fires?, softmax_norm_fires?}. Counters are summed across all parallel hardware (16 DIMM lanes, 6 FC DPEs for NL-DPE / 192 FC dsp_macs for AL).

tolerance._note: Counter equality is integer. Per-stage FSM-edge probes may be ±1 due to whether a pulse lands on the boundary cycle; anything > 1 must be in known_count_deltas.json with file:line citation.

linear_qkv._note: 3 arms × 2 ping-pong DPEs each = 6 DPEs. Per arm, 128 tokens → 128 DPE fires (alternating between dpe_a and dpe_b ping-pong). Sim's run_gemm gives 128 fires per arm × 3 arms = 384 (matches RTL).

mac_qk._note: Sim's gemm_log(M=128, K=64, N=128, n_parallel_dpes=16) with cfg.cols=256 → K_id=4. effective_passes = M*N / K_id = 16384/4 = 4096 total DPE pass invocations across 16 lanes.

softmax_exp._note: Sim's _run_softmax_exp uses dimm_nonlinear once per row × N=128 rows. cols/cfg.cols = 128/256 < 1 → num_passes=1 per row → 128 total exp DPE fires.

softmax_norm._note: Sim's _run_softmax_norm uses norm_fpga + DPE(I|log) per row × N=128 rows → 128 total norm-stage fires.

mac_sv._note: Sim's gemm_log(M=128, K=128, N=64, n_parallel_dpes=16) with K_id=2 → effective_passes = 128*64/2 = 4096 DPE pass invocations across 16 lanes. (cfg.cols=256 / K=128 = 2 elements packed per pass.)

linear_qkv._note: Sim's run_gemm path emits 128 fires per arm × 3 arms = 384 'IMC tile fires' (sim treats AL linear as IMC analog crossbar, not DSP-MAC). RTL has 192 dsp_macs (3 arms × 64 parallel-output) firing 64 times per row × 128 rows × 3 arms = 24,576 dsp_mac fires. Unit mismatch — see known_count_deltas.json.

mac_qk._note: Sim's gemm_dsp(M=128, K=64, N=128, n_parallel_outputs=128) → M*N = 16384 total dsp_mac fires. Lane count = 128 (sim assumes parallel-output along N axis). RTL has only W=16 lanes, so RTL fires = 1 attn row × 128 K rows × 16 lanes = 2048 — see known_count_deltas.json.

softmax_exp._note: Sim's clb_exp branch fires once per row (LUT-based exp on cols values) × N=128 rows = 128 fires.

softmax_norm._note: Sim's norm_fpga fires once per row × N=128 rows = 128 fires.

mac_sv._note: Sim's gemm_dsp(M=128, K=128, N=64, n_parallel_outputs=64) → M*N = 8192 dsp_mac fires. Lane count = 64 (parallel along d_head=64 output cols). RTL has W=16 lanes — see known_count_deltas.json.
